title: Diffract Finding
description: Unified output format for Diffract lens findings. All deterministic tool output is normalized to this schema before being consumed by the review protocol.

findings.description: List of findings produced by one or more tools.

lens.description: The Diffract lens that produced this finding.

id.description: A short, unique-within-run identifier for this finding (e.g., 'S1', 'SH3').

file.description: Path to the file containing the finding, relative to the project root.

line.description: Line number of the finding. 0 if not applicable.

tool.description: The tool that produced this finding (e.g., 'deadcode', 'semgrep'), or 'agent' for LLM judgment calls.
